# Ladnik Law - Blocky Attorney Website

Professional law firm website for injury and immigration attorneys with blocky, geometric design style.

## Project Type
Static HTML/CSS/JavaScript website

## Design Features
- Blocky, geometric sections with strong visual hierarchy
- Professional navy blue and gold color scheme
- Traditional attorney aesthetic
- Responsive layout
- Clean typography

## Practice Areas
- Car Accident Lawyer
- Truck Accident Lawyer
- Slip and Fall Lawyer
- Wrongful Death Lawyer
- Asylum
- Family Visas
- Green Cards
- Citizenship and Naturalization

## Key Sections
- Hero section with firm tagline
- About the firm
- Practice areas
- Process overview
- Client testimonials
- Contact form

## Development Rules
- Use semantic HTML5
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Accessible navigation
- Professional color palette
- No external dependencies
